description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Emscripten build that triggers on push and pull request events. Define a build job with a matrix strategy that runs on windows-latest, ubuntu-20.04, and macos-14 operating systems, with Debug and Release build types, excluding macOS with Release. For each job, clone the repository with submodules, set up the Emscripten build environment, configure CMake with specific arguments, and perform the build.
